title: Returner
description: Returner adds /home, /back, /rtp, and other travel utilities for Forge 1.12.2 servers.
body:
# Overview
Returner is a lightweight quality-of-life mod that modernizes travel commands for legacy Forge 1.12.2 packs. It focuses on reliable player movement, cooldown control, and essential admin helpers without dragging in newer framework requirements.


## Major Features
- Persistent homes, warps, and spawn travel with configurable limits and cooldowns
- Random teleport that scans for safe terrain, respects world borders, and retries intelligently
- `/back` history tracking so players can undo mishaps or return after deaths
- Player-to-player TPA and TPHere request system with accept/deny/cancel flow
- Quick admin helpers including instant heals and toggleable god mode
- Robust per-player data storage with NBT persistence and automatic tab-name sync


## Command Reference
/home /sethome /delhome /homes
/warp /setwarp /delwarp /warps
/spawn /back /rtp
/tpa /tpahere /tpaccept /tpdeny /tpcancel
/heal /god

All commands honor cooldowns and permission checks defined in the configuration.


## Configuration
After first launch, edit `config/warp.cfg` to adjust:
- Enable/disable toggles for each command family
- Cooldown durations per command type
- RTP minimum/maximum distance, attempt count, and block blacklist
- Operator requirements for sensitive utilities like `/heal` and `/god`
Changes can be made in-game via Forge’s mod config screen or by editing the file directly.


## Installation
1. Drop the jar into the `mods` folder of a Forge 1.12.2 server or client.
2. Start once to generate configuration defaults.
3. Tweak `config/warp.cfg` to match your server’s rules, then reload.


## Notes
- Designed for cooperative and survival-focused servers that want essentials-style travel without upgrading past 1.12.2.
- Additional misc utilities are on the roadmap; feedback and crash reports are welcome.
- Works alongside common modpacks; no hard dependencies beyond Forge itself.
